nl: List of books, the publication year of each of them and their authors, ordered by publication year
sql: SELECT TITLE, AÑO "YEAR", NAME "AUTHOR NAME" FROM BOOK NATURAL JOIN AUTHOR_BOOK, AUTHOR WHERE AUTHOR_BOOK.AUTHOR = AUTHOR.IDAUTHOR ORDER BY AÑO;

nl: List of books that were published before 01-01-2000.
sql: SELECT TITLE, AÑO FROM BOOK WHERE AÑO<'2000';

nl: List of clients that have bought at least one book.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT IDCLIENT, NAME FROM CLIENT NATURAL JOIN ORDERS;

nl: List of clients that bought the book whose ISBN= 4554672899910.
sql: SELECT IDCLIENT, NAME FROM CLIENT NATURAL JOIN ORDERS NATURAL JOIN BOOKS_ORDER WHERE ISBN = '4554672899910';

nl: List of clients whose name contains  ‘Jo’ and the books that they have bought.
sql: SELECT IDCLIENT, NAME, TITLE FROM CLIENT NATURAL JOIN ORDERS NATURAL JOIN BOOKS_ORDER NATURAL JOIN BOOK WHERE NAME LIKE '%JO%';

nl: List of clients that have bought at least a book whose price is greater than 10.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT IDCLIENT, NAME FROM CLIENT NATURAL JOIN ORDERS NATURAL JOIN BOOKS_ORDER NATURAL JOIN BOOK WHERE BOOK.SALEPRICE>10;

nl: List of clients that have placed more than one order in the same date.
sql: SELECT IDCLIENT, NAME FROM CLIENT WHERE IDCLIENT = ( SELECT IDCLIENT FROM ORDERS GROUP BY(IDCLIENT,DATEORDER) HAVING COUNT(DATEORDER)>1 );

nl: List of clients and dates in which they have placed orders that have not been sent yet.
sql: SELECT IDCLIENT, NAME, DATEORDER FROM CLIENT NATURAL JOIN ORDERS WHERE DATEEXPED IS NULL;

nl: List of clients that have not bought books whose price is greater than 10.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT IDCLIENT, NAME FROM CLIENT WHERE IDCLIENT NOT IN ( SELECT IDCLIENT FROM ORDERS NATURAL JOIN BOOKS_ORDER NATURAL JOIN BOOK WHERE SALEPRICE < 10 );

nl: List of books whose sale price is greater than 30€ or that were published before 2000.
sql: SELECT TITLE, AÑO, SALEPRICE FROM BOOK WHERE AÑO<'2000' OR SALEPRICE>30;

nl: List of books and amount of copies of each of them that have been sold.
sql: SELECT TITLE, ISBN, SUM(AMOUNT) FROM BOOKS_ORDER NATURAL JOIN BOOK GROUP BY TITLE, ISBN ORDER BY SUM(AMOUNT) DESC;

nl: List of clients and the total amount that they have spent in the bookstore.
sql: SELECT IDCLIENT, NAME, SUM(AMOUNT*SALEPRICE) "TOTAL" FROM CLIENT NATURAL JOIN ORDERS NATURAL JOIN BOOKS_ORDER NATURAL JOIN BOOK GROUP BY IDCLIENT, NAME;

nl: Profits obtained from sales of books.
sql: SELECT SUM(AMOUNT*(SALEPRICE-PURCHASEPRICE)) "TOTAL" FROM BOOKS_ORDER NATURAL JOIN BOOK;

nl: Orders whose total amount is greater than 100.
sql: SELECT IDORDER, SUM(AMOUNT*SALEPRICE) "TOTAL" FROM BOOKS_ORDER NATURAL JOIN BOOK GROUP BY IDORDER HAVING SUM(AMOUNT*SALEPRICE)>100 ORDER BY IDORDER;

nl: Orders and the total amount of each of them that contains more than a book (title).
sql: SELECT IDORDER, SUM(AMOUNT*SALEPRICE) "TOTAL" FROM BOOKS_ORDER NATURAL JOIN BOOK GROUP BY IDORDER HAVING COUNT(TITLE)>1;

nl: Orders and the total amount of each of them that contains more than 4 copies
sql: SELECT IDORDER, SUM(AMOUNT*SALEPRICE) "TOTAL" FROM BOOKS_ORDER NATURAL JOIN BOOK WHERE AMOUNT>4 GROUP BY IDORDER;

nl: List of the most expensive books.
sql: SELECT ISBN, TITLE, SALEPRICE FROM BOOK WHERE SALEPRICE IN (SELECT MAX(SALEPRICE) FROM BOOK);

nl: List of books that have not been sold or that have been sold but the profit per copy is less than 5
sql: SELECT ISBN, TITLE FROM BOOK WHERE(SALEPRICE-PURCHASEPRICE)<5 OR ISBN NOT IN( SELECT DISTINCT ISBN FROM BOOKS_ORDER );

nl: List of clients that have bought more than one copy of a book sometime
sql: SELECT NAME FROM CLIENT NATURAL JOIN ORDERS WHERE IDORDER IN ( SELECT IDORDER FROM BOOKS_ORDER WHERE AMOUNT>1 );
